buggy_code:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3)
for ax in axes:
    ax.plot(x, y)
plt.show()
task: Display subplots without overlapping labels using tight layout
error_location: line 4: plt.tight_layout() not called before plt.show()
clarification_query: Which function prevents subplots from overlapping?
corrected_code:
fig, axes = plt.subplots(1, 3)
for ax in axes:
    ax.plot(x, y)
plt.tight_layout()
plt.show()
explanation: Without tight_layout(), subplots may overlap at their labels and titles.
